'''Davis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who aided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] on [[Skip 5]] when they were attacked by [[Glottalphib]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] hired by [[Nandreeson]].

==Biography==
Davis initially tried to join up with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on Skip 5 in the asteroid belt, [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]]. He helped Solo barter with the Jawa traders on Skip 5 and fired the shot that killed the crime lord Nandreeson's assistant, [[Iisner]] — shedding a somewhat suspicious light on him in Solo's eyes. He was in a relationship with [[Ana Blue]], and was killed in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] when booby trapped [[Droid/Legends|droids]], set by [[Kueller]], exploded on [[Skip 1]]. The droids were not meant for the Skip, and Davis's death was an accident, as well as everyone else's who had died. The smuggled droids had been meant for Coruscant, where they would explode and kill some of the remaining Senators.
